The Menu

Korean soul food,
hand-cut sushi,
— with care.

Dishes marked SIGNATURE are the ones we've been serving since we opened in 1990.

Spicy Vegetarian
⌕

The dishes our regulars order by name. Start here if it's your first visit.

D3

Chicken Bulgogi

Signature

Boneless chicken marinated in a savory spicy sauce, stir-fried with vegetables.

A5

Shumai

Signature

6pc of steamed shrimp dumplings.

Korean Fried Chicken

Crispy, seasoned, and made to share.

6pc Chicken Wings

12pc Chicken Wings

18pc Chicken Wings

03 / 11

Appetizers

Small plates, big flavors — several are meals unto themselves.

A1

Sashimi

16pc of raw fish combination.

A2

Sushi App

6pc of sushi combination.

A3

Janguh Gui

Broiled freshwater eel with sauce.

A4

Gyoza

4pc of beef dumplings.

A5

Shumai

Signature

6pc of steamed shrimp dumplings.

A6

Saengsun Jeon

6pc of pan-fried cod fillet coated in egg batter.

A7

Dumpling Soup

Beef dumpling with homemade beef soup.

A8

Edamame

Steamed young soybean.

A9

Oshinko

Pickled radish.

A10

Octopus Salad

Octopus with mixed vegetable and light dressing.

A11

Seaweed Salad

Angel-hair threads of seaweed, tangled with sesame seed and a light sesame dressing.

A12

Vegetable Salad

Mixed green vegetables with house dressing.

A13

Ebi Su

Shrimp with vinegar-based sauce.

A14

Tako Su

Octopus with vinegar based sauce.

A15

Sunomono

Shrimp, octopus, clam with vinegar based sauce.

A16

Pajeon

Savory Korean-style pancake loaded with scallions and vegetables, pan-fried until golden.

Steamed Rice

Miso Soup

Sushi Rice

Extra Side Dish

No items found for that search.

04 / 11

Soups & Bowls

Restorative bowls simmered low and slow. Order with steamed rice — they belong together.

T1

Galbi Tang

Signature

Beef short rib soup simmered with radish, onions, and glass noodles in a clear, savory broth.

T2

Dduk Mandu Guk

A comforting soup of sliced rice cakes and beef dumplings in a light, flavorful broth.

T3

Yookgaejang

Spicy shredded beef soup with scallions, mushrooms, and glass noodles in a rich red chili broth.

T4

Kimchi Jjigae

Signature

Aged kimchi stew simmered with pork, tofu, and vegetables — bold, spicy, and deeply flavorful.

T5

Soondubu

Soft tofu stew with vegetables and your choice of seafood or meat, served bubbling hot in a spicy broth.

T6

Daegu Maeuntang

Spicy pollack stew with radish, tofu, and vegetables in a fiery red broth.

T7

Vegetable Maeuntang

A spicy, plant-based stew with tofu and seasonal vegetables in a rich chili broth.

T8

Doenjang Jjigae

A savory soybean paste stew with tofu, zucchini, and mushrooms.

T9

Sukuh Jjigae

A comforting soup packed with cod, clams, mussels, scallops, squid, shrimp, and octopus, simmered with mixed veggies in a rich, spicy savory broth.

No items found for that search.

05 / 11

Entrees

Kim family recipes served the same way they've been served for 30+ years.

D1

Beef Bulgogi

Signature

Thinly sliced beef marinated in a sweet and savory soy-based sauce, grilled to perfection with onions and scallions.

D2

Galbi Gui

Signature

Tender beef short ribs marinated in a rich Korean BBQ sauce, grilled for a smoky, caramelized finish.

D3

Chicken Bulgogi

Signature

Boneless chicken marinated in a savory spicy sauce, stir-fried with vegetables.

D4

Pork Bulgogi

Spicy marinated pork stir-fried with onions for a bold, flavorful bite.

D5

Kimchi Jaeyook

Spicy stir-fried pork cooked with aged kimchi for a tangy, fiery combo packed with flavors.

D6

Japchae

Glass noodles stir-fried with beef and mixed vegetables in a light soy-garlic sauce. A sweet and savory Korean favorite.

D7

Teriyaki

Grilled protein glazed in classic teriyaki sauce, served with veggies and rice.

D8

Saengsun Jeon

Lightly pan-fried fish fillets dipped in egg batter, crispy on the outside, tender and savory inside.

D9

Hwe Muchim

Spicy Korean-style sashimi salad — sliced raw fish mixed with vegetables in a tangy, spicy chili sauce.

D10

Fried Rice

Fried rice with egg, vegetables, and your choice of beef, chicken, shrimp, or vegetables.

D11

Ojinguh Bokkeum

Stir-fried squid with vegetables in a spicy sauce — fiery, tender, and full of flavor.

D12

Bibimbap

A colorful rice bowl topped with assorted veggies, beef, and a fried egg, served with gochujang sauce on the side.

D14

Mandu Gui

Pan-fried Korean dumplings filled with seasoned beef and vegetables, crispy on the outside, juicy inside.

D15

Janguh Dupbap

Grilled freshwater eel glazed in sweet soy sauce, served over warm rice with veggies.

D16

Hwe Dupbap

Fresh assorted sashimi over rice, topped with vegetables and a spicy gochujang vinaigrette.

No items found for that search.

06 / 11

Sushi Combos

Hand-cut by our sushi chefs every morning. Today's catch is on the board at the bar.

12 Piece Sushi Platter

Signature

A chef's selection of 12 pieces of assorted sushi, featuring fresh cuts over seasoned rice.

24 Piece Sushi Platter

Signature

A larger variety of 24 assorted sushi pieces, perfect for sharing or satisfying bigger appetites.

Chirashi

A chef's daily assortment of fresh sashimi over sushi rice.

Chirashi B

Chef's selection of fresh fish and shellfish over sushi rice.

Kim's Favorite Roll

Signature

Blend of fresh tuna, yellowtail, salmon, and broiled eel, rolled with seasoned rice and nori for a balanced and flavorful experience. (16pc)

Kim's Spicy Roll

Signature

A vibrant blend of tuna, yellowtail, crab, and salmon, rolled with seasoned rice and nori, with a spicy sauce for a flavorful kick.

Sashimi Platter

An assortment of fresh, sliced raw fish — no rice, just pure sashimi, beautifully presented.

Sushi Sashimi Platter

A balanced combination of fresh sushi and sliced sashimi, served with rice and garnishes.

No items found for that search.

07 / 11

Special Rolls

Signature creations from our sushi bar — each one a Downtown Pittsburgh original.

After Dead Roll

Signature

Kani, tobiko, and cucumber wrapped tight, then hit with a fiery sauce. Bold, clean crunch meets pure heat. Handle with caution.

Downtown Roll

Signature

Half soft shell crab, half shrimp tempura, fully bold. With cucumber and mayo for a creamy crunch, this roll brings the best of both worlds.

Dragon Roll

Dynamite Roll

Kani, tobiko, and cucumber with homemade spicy sauce (8pc).

Futomaki Roll

A classic jumbo roll packed with tamago, kani, cucumber, pickled radish, and spinach. Colorful, balanced, and satisfyingly bold in every bite.

Rainbow Roll

A California roll base topped with vibrant slices of tuna, salmon, and other fresh fish. A colorful mix of flavor, texture, and freshness.

No items found for that search.

08 / 11

Rolls

Classic maki, made fresh. Ask your server about today's specials.

Avocado Roll

Creamy avocado slices wrapped in sushi rice and nori, offering a smooth and mild taste.

BBQ Scallop Roll

Grilled scallops glazed with a sweet sauce, paired with cucumber, wrapped in rice and nori.

BBQ Yellowtail Roll

Grilled yellowtail with a smoky flavor, complemented by cucumber and wrapped in sushi rice and nori.

Bulgogi Roll

Marinated Korean-style grilled beef with pickled radish, wrapped in sushi rice and nori, blending savory and sweet flavors.

California Roll

A popular inside-out roll with imitation crab and cucumber, topped with sesame seeds and tobiko.

Cucumber Roll

Fresh cucumber strips rolled in rice and nori, providing a crisp and refreshing bite.

Eel Roll

Grilled freshwater eel glazed with sweet soy-based sauce, combined with cucumber and wrapped in rice and nori.

Fried Tofu Roll

Sweet and savory fried tofu paired with sushi rice, wrapped in nori for a vegetarian option.

Philadelphia Roll

Smoked salmon, cream cheese, and cucumber rolled together for a rich and creamy flavor profile.

Pickled Radish Roll

Tangy and crunchy pickled daikon radish wrapped in rice and nori, offering a vibrant flavor.

Red Snapper Roll

Delicate red snapper wrapped in rice and nori for a light, clean flavor.

Salmon Roll

Fresh salmon rolled in sushi rice and nori, offering a rich and refreshing flavor.

Salmon Skin Roll

Crispy grilled salmon skin paired with cucumber, offering a smoky and savory flavor.

Scallop Roll

Sweet, tender scallops wrapped with sushi rice and nori, creating a delicate and slightly creamy bite.

Seaweed Salad Roll

Seasoned seaweed salad combined with sushi rice and nori, delivering a savory and slightly sweet taste.

Shrimp Tempura Roll

Crispy shrimp tempura with mayo, cucumber, and tobiko, rolled in rice and nori, offering a delightful crunch.

Smoked Salmon Roll

Smoked salmon combined with cucumber, wrapped in rice and nori for a rich and creamy taste.

Tuna Roll

A classic hosomaki featuring lean, tender tuna wrapped in seasoned rice and nori.

Vegetable Combo Roll

A medley of fresh vegetables like spinach, cucumber, and carrots rolled together for a colorful and healthy option.

White Tuna Roll

Mild and buttery white tuna (albacore) paired with seasoned rice and nori, offering a smooth texture and subtle taste.

Yellowtail Roll

Yellowtail delivering a buttery and mildly sweet taste.

No items found for that search.

09 / 11

À La Carte

Individual nigiri and sashimi pieces. Two pieces per order unless noted.

Maguro

Tuna

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Sake

Salmon

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Hamachi

Yellowtail

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Tai

Red Snapper

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Unagi

Eel

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Albacore

White Tuna

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Saba

Mackerel

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Tako

Octopus

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Ika

Squid

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Hotate Gai

Scallop

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Hokki Gai

Artic Clam

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Tobiko

Flying Fish Roe

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Ebi

Shrimp

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Smoked Salmon

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Kani

Crab

Choose 2 pieces, served either as nigiri or sashimi.

Tamago

Egg Omelette

A delicate, sweet Japanese rolled omelet layered atop vinegared rice and secured with a strip of nori, providing a light and satisfying taste.

Inari

Fried Tofu

Sweet and savory sushi rice encased in a marinated deep-fried tofu pouch, offering a tender texture with a delightful balance of flavors.

No items found for that search.

10 / 11

Special Dishes

Hot pot and braised dishes — perfect for the table to share.

J1

Haemool Jeongol

Seafood hot pot with shrimp, squid, mussels, and vegetables in a spicy broth, great for sharing.

J2

Bulnak Jeongol

Spicy hot pot with marinated beef bulgogi and octopus, simmered with vegetables in a bold broth.

J3

Dakdori Tang

Spicy braised chicken stew with potatoes, carrots, and onions in a rich red pepper sauce.

No items found for that search.

11 / 11

Beverages

Soft drinks and sparkling ades.

Coca-Cola

Coca-Cola Original Taste, the crisp, refreshing taste you know and love.

Coca-Cola Zero Sugar

Great taste of Coca-Cola with zero sugar, zero calories.

Brisk

Out of stock

Sprite

Classic, cool, crisp lemon-lime flavored taste that's caffeine free.

Perrier

Ginger Ale

Bottled Water

Sparkling Yuzu Ade

Sparkling Passion Fruit Ade

Sparkling Mango Ade

Sushi Kim 2

A 30+ year Pittsburgh institution serving soulful Korean cooking and premium Japanese sushi in the heart of downtown.
